hero.name: Oscar Fabián Ruiz de Chávez
hero.intro: I build robust web applications and intelligent automation solutions. Specialized in Angular, React and .NET, with hands-on experience applying AI to real-world processes.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a Systems Development Engineer with 6+ years of experience building web applications for both public and private sectors. I've developed critical electoral systems at IEEG and contributed to the global Cemex Go platform at Neoris. I'm passionate about intelligent automation and applying local LLMs to solve real business problems.

ieeg.company: Electoral Institute of the State of Guanajuato
ieeg.description: Developing web applications for electoral and administrative processes. AI-powered workflow automation, Unity data visualization, and AWS infrastructure management.
highlights: Email automation with AI (Ollama + spaCy + ticket generation)
Development with Angular, React, .NET C#, TypeScript
Infrastructure on AWS EC2, Docker, Linux, Nginx

freelance.description: Development and maintenance of client websites with a focus on PHP and WordPress.
highlights: Development and maintenance of PHP and WordPress-based websites
Implementation of new features and customization of themes and plugins
Administration and optimization of web services to improve performance and availability
Bug fixes, security updates and technical support for clients

neoris.description: Built reusable Angular components and shared libraries for the global Cemex Go platform. REST API integration, Service Workers, and contribution to the Olivia chatbot.
highlights: Reusable Angular components and libraries at global scale
Advanced REST API integration with HTTP Client
International team collaboration with Git, Postman, Jira

emailAI.title: Email Automation with AI
emailAI.description: Automation pipeline that processes emails using a local LLM (Ollama), extracts entities with spaCy, and automatically generates support tickets.

unityViz.title: Unity Data Visualization
unityViz.description: Interactive electoral data visualization apps built in Unity for IEEG. Dynamic charts and real-time visual reports.

ieegApps.title: IEEG Web Applications
ieegApps.description: Suite of administrative web apps for the Electoral Institute. Management systems, citizen portals and dashboards with Angular, React and .NET.
